title: Pride Paintings
description: Pride Paintings adds pride flag paintings to the game!
body:
**Pride Paintings** adds pride flag paintings to the game! This is a smoother alternative to using the Camera Mod or other picture mods for pride flags!

**Suggest new paintings in the comments below! I will add as many as I can.**

![Current Paintings!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63cfecbee3ee061dc98410a5f37faad84adf7357_0.webp)

Github:
[https://github.com/toastydoll/pridepaintings](https://github.com/toastydoll/pridepaintings)
